calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Morgan Stanley Smith Barney Llc, George F Manska And Lynda G Schultz Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon
Off Calendar Jul-17-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jeff Palmer, Esq. 415-655-1267 of GreenbergTraurig for Petitioner MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC., GEORGE MANSKA, LYNDA SCHULTZ.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC., GEORGE MANSKA, LYNDA SCHULTZ's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon.

Petitioners Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC, George Manska and Lynda Schultz's petition to confirm arbitration award is granted. No opposition filed.

Order and Judgment signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/HK)
